name: Easy Chicken Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Stove Top Chicken stuffing Mix
3 cups cooked chicken or turkey cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix the hot water and margarine until the margarine is melted. Stir in the stuffing mix just until moist; set aside.
3. In another large bowl, mix the soup and milk until smooth. Stir in the chicken, vegetables, mushrooms, and thyme. Pour into a 12x8 inch glass baking dish.
4. Spoon the stuffing evenly over the top.
5. Bake for 35 minutes or until heated through.
